title: Electric Kettle Glass 2L – 1800W Fast Boil, BPA-Free, Quiet Boil, Blue LED, No Plastic, Boil-Dry Protection, Black Electric Glass Kettle
features: Fast Boil Electric Kettle – 1800W Power: Fast Boil water in just a few minutes with the efficient 1800W heating element. Ideal for busy mornings, quick brews, or instant meals. Perfect small glass kettle for home, office, or student use.

GREAT 2 Litre Capacity with a compact design – Space-Saving Design: With a 2L capacity, this electric kettle is perfect for a family of 4. A great choice for kitchens, travel, or caravans. Enjoy quick hot drinks without taking up too much space.

BPA-Free & Plastic-Free Interior – Pure Water Taste: Made with high-quality borosilicate glass and a stainless steel inner lid & spout, this kettle ensures no plastic comes into contact with hot water – providing cleaner, fresher taste every time.

Stylish Blue LED Light – Modern & Functional: Watch your water boil with a bright blue LED indicator light, adding a sleek touch to any kitchen countertop. LED lights up during boiling for easy visibility and style.
Quiet Boiling – Ideal for Any Setting: Enjoy a quieter boiling experience compared to traditional kettles – perfect for shared spaces, bedrooms, or quiet homes.
description: Product Description BARGAIN FACTORY – Quality & Innovation in Every Home Appliance Premium Design with Everyday Convenience The Bargain Factory Electric Kettle is thoughtfully designed for safe and effortless use. The ergonomic heat-resistant handle offers a firm grip, while the secure lid lock system prevents accidental spills. With its anti-drip spout , every pour is smooth and mess-free. This sleek, modern kettle blends functionality with elegant form — perfect for any kitchen or workspace. Designed for Pure Boiling, Easy Use & Total Safety Pure Borosilicate Glass – No Plastic Contact Crafted with high-quality, heat-resistant borosilicate glass , this kettle keeps your water pure and fresh. The inner lid and spout are made of stainless steel , ensuring zero plastic touches your boiling water . Enjoy clean taste and peace of mind every time. Wide Mouth for Easy Refills & Cleaning The large opening makes filling and cleaning effortless. Whether you’re adding water or wiping down the interior, the wide inlet ensures hygienic, hassle-free maintenance . No more struggling with tight spaces or hard-to-reach corners. Auto Shut-Off for Safe Boiling Smart technology powers off the kettle once boiling is complete. The automatic shut-off system ensures energy efficiency and prevents overboiling — giving you safe operation every time. Dry-Boil & Power Surge Protection Advanced safety mechanisms protect your kettle from damage in case of power outages or accidental dry burning . The system cuts off power automatically, extending the life of your appliance and keeping you and your kitchen safe . One Kettle. Endless Everyday Uses. From early morning hydration to baby-safe water prep, coffee rituals, and relaxing tea moments — the Bargain Factory Electric Glass Kettle fits perfectly into every part of your day. Fast, quiet, and safe, it's your go-to kettle for the entire family. Product Specifications at a Glance Brand Bargain Factory Model Glass Electric Kettle 2L – 1800W Capacity 2 Litres Material Borosilicate Glass, Stainless Steel, BPA-Free Plastic (Exterior only) Power 1800 Watts Voltage 240V AC Heating Element Concealed, Stainless Steel Time Approx. 3–5 minutes (full boil) Safety Features Auto Shut-Off, Boil-Dry Protection, Power Surge Cut-Off Spout Design Anti-Drip, Stainless Steel Interior Handle Heat-Resistant, Ergonomic Grip Lighting Blue LED Indicator During Boil Noise Level Quiet Boil Operation Dimensions 23L x 16W x 21H cm Weight Approx. 1.2 kg Colour Black with Transparent Glass
